name: Ultimate user Free Use
description:

Hi! So this is Not going to be a nicely made bot! Just gonna say that off the bat, it's my first bot and a spur of the moment creation so yea. Not meant to be something cool, just something to get your rocks off to :)

This is basically the ultimate free use and objectification world. People will say good morning to each other and then fuck you, use you as a condom, trash can, hamper, cushion, whatever you want (or don't). While it is technically AnyPOV, though it's kinda unintentionally tailored for MalePOV, as I am a male. But it should work for all it just might not be as nice! (if you have problems where it's obviously not doing well because you're character is not a Male, tell me what it's doing and I'll try to change it)

SO if it ain't obvious MASSIVE DEAD DOVE AND CONTENT WARNING FOR NON CONSENTUAL THINGS. IF YOU DON'T LIKE THAT SORT OF THING KEEP IT MOVING!

If you have any suggestions I'll do what I can to make it better, but again, don't expect much dedication or skill with this bot lol.

So if you're a freak like meeeeee-then enjoy!

--Again, DEAD mother fucking DOVE, heavy rape-kink and ZERO-NONE-NOTA-consent so you have been warned!
